# kCVMetalTextureUsage

**Global Variable**

The set of options that define how you can use a texture on the GPU.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVMetalTextureUsage: CFString
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Metal/MTLTextureUsage/unknown]. Use only values which are valid for [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Metal/MTLTextureUsage].

## Constants

- **kCVMetalTextureCacheMaximumTextureAgeKey**: The length of time, in seconds, before the cache is automatically evicted.
